Solution 10

Network Security

Comprehensive network security covering performance monitoring, traffic visibility, access control, vulnerability management, and DDoS mitigation for modern enterprise networks.

Key Vendors & Brands

Click any brand to see product details

AR
Array Networks ADC & SSL VPN
＋ View details
AR

Array Networks

ADC & SSL VPN

Array Networks provides application delivery controllers (ADC) and SSL VPN solutions -- ensuring enterprise applications are always available, fast, and secure.

Key Features

  • Layer 4-7 load balancing and application delivery
  • SSL offloading for web servers
  • SSL VPN for remote access
  • Global server load balancing (GSLB)
  • Application health monitoring

Use Cases

  • ✓ Load balance traffic across data centre servers for high availability
  • ✓ Offload SSL processing from web application servers
  • ✓ Provide secure remote access for employees without full VPN
Why CrewTEC recommends Array Networks

Array Networks delivers enterprise ADC at competitive pricing. CrewTEC deploys Array ADC for organisations needing reliable application delivery without hyperscaler pricing.

Interested in Array Networks? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Array Networks →
A1
A10 Networks DDoS & ADC
＋ View details
A1

A10 Networks

DDoS & ADC

A10 Networks provides Thunder ADC and DDoS protection solutions -- delivering high-performance application delivery and volumetric attack mitigation for service providers and enterprises.

Key Features

  • High-performance multi-Gbps ADC
  • DDoS protection with machine learning
  • SSL/TLS inspection at scale
  • DNS application firewall
  • Carrier-grade NAT

Use Cases

  • ✓ Absorb volumetric DDoS attacks against public-facing services
  • ✓ Inspect encrypted traffic at line rate without bottlenecks
  • ✓ Protect DNS infrastructure from amplification attacks
Why CrewTEC recommends A10 Networks

A10 Networks delivers the performance service providers and large enterprises demand. CrewTEC deploys A10 for organisations with high-throughput requirements and DDoS exposure.

Interested in A10 Networks? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for A10 Networks →
TE
Tenable Vulnerability Management
＋ View details
TE

Tenable

Vulnerability Management

Tenable is the global leader in exposure management -- providing continuous visibility into all assets and vulnerabilities across IT, OT, cloud, and containers.

Key Features

  • Tenable.io for cloud-based vulnerability management
  • Nessus for network vulnerability scanning
  • Tenable OT Security for industrial environments
  • Asset inventory and risk scoring
  • Compliance auditing (CIS, DISA, PCI)

Use Cases

  • ✓ Discover every asset on your network including unknown devices
  • ✓ Prioritise which CVEs to patch first based on exploitability
  • ✓ Meet compliance requirements with automated audit scans
Why CrewTEC recommends Tenable

Tenable is trusted by 40,000+ organisations globally. CrewTEC deploys Tenable and operationalises it for SOC and IT teams with customised dashboards and vulnerability workflows.

Interested in Tenable? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Tenable →
AR
Arista Cloud Networking
＋ View details
AR

Arista

Cloud Networking

Arista Networks delivers cloud-grade networking with EOS -- a single consistent operating system providing high-availability switching, routing, and network telemetry.

Key Features

  • CloudVision for network-wide visibility and automation
  • EVPN/VXLAN for data centre fabric
  • Multi-cloud networking
  • Network detection and response (NDR)
  • Zero-touch provisioning

Use Cases

  • ✓ Build a scalable, automated data centre network fabric
  • ✓ Gain real-time telemetry across the entire network estate
  • ✓ Detect lateral movement using network behaviour analytics
Why CrewTEC recommends Arista

Arista leads in data centre and cloud networking. CrewTEC deploys Arista for enterprise data centres requiring high-performance, programmable networking infrastructure.

Interested in Arista? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Arista →
NE
NetScout Network Management
＋ View details
NE

NetScout

Network Management

NetScout provides network performance management and DDoS protection -- giving enterprises and service providers real-time visibility into network and application performance.

Key Features

  • Smart data technology for network visibility
  • DDoS protection (Arbor)
  • Application performance management
  • Service assurance for unified communications
  • Packet-level forensics

Use Cases

  • ✓ Diagnose network performance issues before users complain
  • ✓ Protect against volumetric and multi-vector DDoS attacks
  • ✓ Monitor VoIP and UC quality across the enterprise
Why CrewTEC recommends NetScout

NetScout Arbor is the most deployed DDoS protection globally. CrewTEC deploys NetScout for enterprises and ISPs requiring both performance visibility and DDoS mitigation.

Interested in NetScout? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for NetScout →
RI
Riverbed WAN Optimisation
＋ View details
RI

Riverbed

WAN Optimisation

Riverbed delivers WAN optimisation and SD-WAN solutions -- accelerating application performance across branch offices and hybrid environments.

Key Features

  • WAN optimisation with byte-caching
  • SD-WAN for intelligent traffic routing
  • Application acceleration for Office 365, SAP, and Oracle
  • Network visibility with SteelCentral
  • Cloud acceleration

Use Cases

  • ✓ Accelerate SAP and ERP performance for branch office users
  • ✓ Reduce WAN bandwidth consumption by up to 95%
  • ✓ Replace MPLS with cost-effective SD-WAN
Why CrewTEC recommends Riverbed

Riverbed remains the leader in WAN optimisation with a proven track record. CrewTEC deploys Riverbed for enterprises with branch office performance challenges and MPLS cost pressures.

Interested in Riverbed? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Riverbed →
KE
Keysight Network Testing & Visibility
＋ View details
KE

Keysight

Network Testing & Visibility

Keysight provides network test, visibility, and security validation solutions -- ensuring your network and security infrastructure performs as expected under real-world conditions.

Key Features

  • Network packet broker for traffic visibility
  • Security testing and validation
  • Application and network performance testing
  • Inline bypass for security tools
  • Cloud visibility solutions

Use Cases

  • ✓ Validate that your security tools actually catch the threats they claim to
  • ✓ Tap and distribute network traffic to security tools without packet loss
  • ✓ Test network performance before and after infrastructure changes
Why CrewTEC recommends Keysight

Keysight validates that your security investments actually work. CrewTEC uses Keysight for security infrastructure validation and network visibility projects.

Interested in Keysight? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

AL
Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise Networking
＋ View details
AL

Alcatel-Lucent

Enterprise Networking

Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise provides campus, data centre, and SD-WAN networking solutions with AI-driven network management for modern enterprise environments.

Key Features

  • OmniSwitch campus switching
  • OmniAccess Stellar Wi-Fi 6
  • OmniVista cloud network management
  • SD-WAN and SD-Branch solutions
  • IoT network segmentation

Use Cases

  • ✓ Build a Wi-Fi 6 campus network with centralised cloud management
  • ✓ Segment IoT and OT devices from the corporate network
  • ✓ Deploy SD-WAN for branch office connectivity
Why CrewTEC recommends Alcatel-Lucent

Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise delivers proven campus networking. CrewTEC deploys ALE infrastructure for education, healthcare, and enterprise campus environments across India.

OP
OpenText Network Access Control
＋ View details
OP

OpenText

Network Access Control

OpenText (Microfocus) Network Access Control provides visibility and control over every device connecting to the network -- enforcing compliance before granting access.

Key Features

  • Device discovery and profiling
  • Policy-based network access control
  • Guest network management
  • IoT device segmentation
  • Integration with Active Directory and MDM

Use Cases

  • ✓ Automatically segment unmanaged IoT devices to isolated VLANs
  • ✓ Enforce compliance checks before devices join the corporate network
  • ✓ Manage guest Wi-Fi access with time-limited credentials
Why CrewTEC recommends OpenText

NAC is foundational for Zero Trust network segmentation. CrewTEC deploys OpenText NAC integrated with Active Directory and MDM for complete device access governance.

Interested in OpenText? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for OpenText →

What We Help You Achieve

  • ✓ Gain full visibility into east-west and north-south traffic
  • ✓ Detect and remediate vulnerabilities before attackers exploit them
  • ✓ Optimise application delivery across hybrid networks
  • ✓ Protect against large-scale volumetric DDoS attacks
  • ✓ Ensure network performance with SD-WAN and WAN optimisation

Key Features

Network traffic analysis and flow monitoring

Continuous vulnerability scanning and prioritisation

Application delivery controller (ADC) with load balancing

SD-WAN for branch office connectivity

Network access control (NAC) with device profiling
